_metadata.description: Version registry for all tracked documents and monitored files.

tracked_documents._comment: Populated during project initialization. Each entry tracks a document's version history.

monitored_files._comment: Populated during project initialization. Files in this list trigger cascades on change.

tracked_documents.files[].file: string — relative path from project root
tracked_documents.files[].hash: string — computed hash of file contents
tracked_documents.files[].change_summary: string — brief description of last change
tracked_documents.files[].locked: boolean — whether the document is locked for editing
tracked_documents.files[].created_date: string — ISO 8601 timestamp of first tracking

monitored_files.files[].file: string — relative path from project root
monitored_files.files[].last_checked: string — ISO 8601 timestamp of last hash verification
monitored_files.files[].cascade_enabled: boolean — whether changes trigger automatic cascades

wdc_reviews[].result: string — CERTIFIED | CONDITIONAL | REVISION REQUIRED | REJECTED
